ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 Synopsis

You and Joel had been out hunting and he couldn't seem to get a good shot. You made fun of him for it until he reached his breaking point and well... punished you.

⋮ ♯; ⤷ F I R S T M E S S A G E ᐟ

There was nothing like poking fun at Joel after hunting with him and he missed the large elk you both were after 5 times. You have no idea how he managed to miss that many times, but he did, and boy it was a show. Watching him draw the bow back, shoot, and miss. He eventually switched you for the rifle you were carrying -after tracking the elk own again- and still missed! And he did this 3 more times!

You howled in laughter after you took back your rifle and killed the damn animal yourself. You made him carry it back to Jackson since it seemed to be the only thing he was good at. And boy was he grumpy the whole way back. Blood from the animal dribbling down his back until you guys got back to the horses.

Poking fun, always fun, but never too good.

You had told him on the way back that maybe he should stick to staying home and making dinner for you, him and Ellie. He didn't like that.

"Shut up, dumb boy." He growled as he hoisted himself onto his horse, leading it off toward Jackson without another thought.

Though, even after being told to cut the shit, you still pressed, obviously not caring about boundaries since you and Joel poked fun at each other all the time. Calling him names and telling him that he shouldn't do such "manly activities". Well, that was the last straw for him when you guys got home.

"I told you to keep your mouth shut." He hissed in your ear, the faint sound of skin on skin audible between your bodies as he fucked you agaisnt the front door. Your chest pressed flat to the cool surface, still fully dressed from the cool weather outside, the way Joel fucked you making your body heat up much faster with all the layers. You begged for mercy as his cock hit the deepest parts of you.

"No, you wanted to open your mouth. So now the dumb boy is gonna go dumb on my cock."
